title: Ubiquiti LTU-XR, 5GHz LTU, Extreme range CPE
description: LTU-XR is a PtMP client unit for the 5GHz band with an antenna gain of 29 dBi and LTU's proprietary wireless technology, which is not built on the limited 802.11 standard, which can achieve a real TCP/IP speed of 550 Mbps+ and modulation up to 1024 QAM . The unit is also equipped with a Bluetooth radio for management and initial setup using the UISP application directly from the mast where you install it PtMP client unit Antenna gain 29 dBi, range up to 35 km 1024 QAM 10/20/30/40/50 MHz channel width The setting is handled centrally by the AP Frequency separation of Tx and Rx frequency Automatic performance adjustment Bridge and router mode support Integrated GPS Quick setup via Bluetooth via UISP mobile app LTU technology allows you to use different frequencies for transmit (Tx) and receive (Rx) to avoid interference, thus increasing the throughput of your network LTU is a completely new platform based on proprietary technology that does not use the 802.11 protocol. It is not compatible with devices from the airMAX M5 or airMAX 5AC series. On the other hand, although LTU is based on the technology used by airFiber products, they use a different protocol for communication, so LTU products are not compatible with AF-5X or AF-5/5U products either In addition to its own web management, LTU products are also supported by UISP software (UNMS) for central control and management of Ubiquiti devices Device (emitter) Antenna - 3 parts Mast holder (3) Metal zip ties Screws Gigabit PoE power adapter 24 V/0.5 A Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 1024 QAM Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards LTU Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 25 Security WPA2 AES 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 29 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet 22 .. 26V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 8,5 Physical characteristics Protection class IPX6 Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 55 Weight [g] 3200 Width [mm] 747 Height [mm] 525 Depth [mm] 347
